parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: Specifies an entity id to start retrieving entries from. This is normally only used in generated nextlinks.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: AccountGroupKey
parameters.description: account group key for accounts used in retrieving the trade data. If specified, activities of the specified account will be returned/published otherwise activities of all accounts represented by ClientKey.

parameters.name: AccountKey
parameters.description: Unique key identifying the account used in retrieving the trade data. If specified, activities of the specified account will be returned/published otherwise activities of all accounts represented by ClientKey.

parameters.name: Activities
parameters.description: Specification of activity types to return in results.

parameters.name: CANotificationTypes
parameters.description: Corporate action notification type to get the response for.

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: Unique key identifying the client. If specified, activities of the specified client will be returned/published otherwise for logged in client.

parameters.name: CorporateActionEventTypes
parameters.description: Corporate Action Event type

parameters.name: CorporateActionTypes
parameters.description: Specify corporate action category, if any.

parameters.name: Duration
parameters.description: The order duration type.

children.name: AtTheClose
children.description: Working at the closing auction only

children.name: AtTheOpening
children.description: Working at the opening auction only

children.name: DayOrder
children.description: Day order - working in all session until trade date roll

children.name: GoodTillCancel
children.description: Good Till Cancel - working until explicitly cancelled

children.name: ImmediateOrCancel
children.description: Fill or fill partially and cancel remaining

parameters.name: ExpirationDateTime
parameters.description: The expiration date should only be set if the duration type is GoodTillDate.

parameters.name: FieldGroups
parameters.description: Specification of field groups to return in results.

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange.

parameters.name: FromDateTime
parameters.description: If specified, activities starting FromDateTime will be returned/published. Default returns current day activities

parameters.name: IncludeSubAccounts
parameters.description: If specified true, activities of sub-clients will also be returned/published.

parameters.name: OrderStatuses
parameters.description: List of order statuses.

children.name: Parked
children.description: Order is Parked. Only applicable if 'Parked Order' functionality is configured for partner.

parameters.name: OrderSubStatuses
parameters.description: List of order sub statuses.

parameters.name: OrderTypes
parameters.description: List of order types.

children.name: DealCapture
children.description: Deal Capture Order. Specify to capture trades, which are already registered on Exchange, into Saxo System. Currently supported for selected partners only.

children.name: TriggerBreakout
children.description: A Breakout Order (Trigger order with up and down prices)

children.name: TriggerLimit
children.description: Similar to Limit order type but used only with Trigger orders

children.name: TriggerStop
children.description: Similar to Stop order type but used only with Trigger orders

parameters.name: PositionEventFilter
parameters.description: Specify position event filter if any. Default is PositionEventFilter.All.

children.name: TradesOnly
children.description: Positions events related fills or allocations.

parameters.name: SequenceId
parameters.description: If specified and message with SequenceId available in ENS cache, streaming of events start from SequenceId. If sequenceId not found in ENS system, Subscription Error with "Sequence id unavailable" If not specified and FromDateTime is not specified, subscription will be real-time subscription.

parameters.name: SourceOrderId
parameters.description: OrderId filter for activity types Orders and Positions.

parameters.name: TimeOnMargin
parameters.description: Time the client has been on margin. If specified, margin activities with greater or equal to the time specified otherwise all activities.

parameters.name: ToDateTime
parameters.description: If specified, activities ending ToDateTime will be returned/published.

endpoints.name: Create a subscription for client events

parameters.name: Arguments
parameters.description: Arguments for the subscription request.

children.name: AccountGroupKey
children.description: account group key for accounts used in retrieving the trade data. If specified, activities of the specified account will be returned/published otherwise activities of all accounts represented by ClientKey.

children.name: AccountKey
children.description: Unique key identifying the account used in retrieving the trade data. If specified, activities of the specified account will be returned/published otherwise activities of all accounts represented by ClientKey.

children.name: Activities
children.description: Specification of activity types to return in results.

children.name: ClientKey
children.description: Unique key identifying the client. If specified, activities of the specified client will be returned/published otherwise for logged in client.

children.name: CorporateActionEventFilter
children.description: Specify corporate action event filter, if any.

children.name: CANotificationTypes
children.description: List of corporate action notification types.

children.name: CorporateActionTypes
children.description: Specify corporate action category, if any.

children.name: FieldGroups
children.description: Specification of field groups to return in results.

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange.

children.name: FromDateTime
children.description: If specified, activities starting FromDateTime will be returned/published. Default returns current day activities

children.name: IncludeSubAccounts
children.description: If specified true, activities of sub-clients will also be returned/published.

children.name: OrderEventFilter
children.description: Specify order event filter if any.

children.name: AtTheClose
children.description: At the close of the trading session.

children.name: AtTheOpening
children.description: At the opening of the trading session.

children.name: DayOrder
children.description: Day Order - Valid for the trading session.

children.name: GoodTillDate
children.description: Good til Date - Expiration Date must also be specified.

children.name: ExpirationDate
children.description: The expiration date, should only be set if the duration type is GoodTillDate.

children.name: ExpirationDateContainsTime
children.description: The value indicating whether the ExpirationDateTime field contains the time. Notice, that the value can only be true for GoodTillDate duration type and the time must be provided in the ExpirationDateTime.

children.name: ExpirationDateTime
children.description: The expiration date (and optionally time), should only be set if the duration type is GoodTillDate. If the field contains the time, it must always be expressed in the exchange local time and the ExpirationDateContainsTime property must me set to true. Time zone indication must never be added. The time part should be in the following format: HH:mm, where HH is 24 hour clock. Seconds and milliseconds are not allowed.

children.name: ExpiryTimeOnExchange Obsolete
children.description: The field has been obsoleted and has no effect. Use ExpirationDateTime and ExpirationDateContainsTime instead.

children.name: Parked
children.description: Order is Parked. Only applicable if 'Parked Order' functionality is configured for partner.

children.name: DealCapture
children.description: Deal Capture Order. Specify to capture trades, which are already registered on Exchange, into Saxo System. Currently supported for selected partners only.

children.name: TriggerBreakout
children.description: A Breakout Order (Trigger order with up and down prices)

children.name: TriggerLimit
children.description: Similar to Limit order type but used only with Trigger orders

children.name: TriggerStop
children.description: Similar to Stop order type but used only with Trigger orders

children.name: PositionEventFilter
children.description: Specify position event filter if any. Default is PositionEventFilter.All.

children.name: TradesOnly
children.description: Positions events related fills or allocations.

children.name: SequenceId
children.description: If specified and message with SequenceId available in ENS cache, streaming of events start from SequenceId. If sequenceId not found in ENS system, Subscription Error with "Sequence id unavailable" If not specified and FromDateTime is not specified, subscription will be real-time subscription.

children.name: TimeOnMargin
children.description: Time the client has been on margin. If specified, margin activities with greater or equal to the time specified otherwise all activities.

children.name: ToDateTime
children.description: If specified, activities ending ToDateTime will be returned/published.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The streaming context id that this request is associated with. This parameter must only contain letters (a-z) and numbers (0-9) as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Optional Media type (RFC 2046) of the serialized data updates that are streamed to the client. Currently only application/json and application/x-protobuf is supported. If an unrecognized format is specified, the subscription end point will return HTTP status code 400 - Bad format.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Mandatory client specified reference id for the subscription. This parameter must only contain alphanumberic characters as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). Cannot start with _. It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: RefreshRate
parameters.description: Optional custom refresh rate, measured in milliseconds, between each data update. Note that it is not possible to get a refresh rate lower than the rate specified in the customer service level agreement (SLA).

parameters.name: ReplaceReferenceId
parameters.description: Reference id of the subscription that should be replaced.

parameters.name: Tag Obsolete
parameters.description: : Optional client specified tag used for grouping subscriptions.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The context id part of the streaming session (used to identify the subscription within a streaming session).

parameters.name: Tag
parameters.description: Optional. Remove only subscriptions that are marked with specified tag.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: Unique streaming context ID part of the streaming session.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the subscription
